channel.title: Untagged on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Untagged on Arrans github.io

item.title: google-ai-edge/gallery
item.description: A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.

item.description: Staging repo for development of native port of TypeScript

item.title: torvalds/linux

item.title: microsoft/Extensible-Storage-Engine
item.description: ESE is an embedded / ISAM-based database engine, that provides rudimentary table and indexed access. However the library provides many other strongly layered and and thus reusable sub-facilities as well: A Synchronization / Locking library, a Data-structures / STL-like library, an OS-abstraction layer, and a Cache Manager, as well the full blown database engine itself

item.description: Focus on prompting and generating

item.title: google/pebble
item.description: This is the latest version of the internal repository from Pebble Technology providing the software to run on Pebble watches. Proprietary source code has been removed from this repository and it will not compile as-is. This is for information only.
